v1_1_changelog: Sample-rate correction 250 Hz → 125 Hz (Cyton+Daisy 16ch native, BoardShim.get_sampling_rate(CYTON_DAISY_BOARD)=125 verified mac-local with brainflow 5.21.0). Affected files: clm_eeg_synthetic_fixture.hexa (4s window 1000→500 samples), clm_eeg_p1_lz_pre_register.hexa (post-arrival input descriptor), synthetic_16ch_v1.json (sample_rate_hz/window_samples). Helper tool/anima_eeg_brainflow_ingest.hexa (sibling, not in this freeze list) updated to query fs dynamically via BrainFlow API + brainflow 5.21+ importlib.metadata version probe + selftest assert dynamic. brainflow_version=5.21.0, python=3.12.12, .venv-eeg rebuilt (was 3.14.3 distutils-broken). Frozen criteria thresholds (C1/C2 across P1/P2/P3) UNCHANGED — falsification surface preserved. Falsifiable hypothesis identical, only the sample-rate metadata corrected. v1.0 → v1.1 sha re-freeze; verdict_rule unmodified.
scope: Path A (Q1) — CLM ↔ EEG falsifier pre-register, dry-run on synthetic 16ch fixture. Real-EEG verification deferred to post-arrival D+1/D+3/D+5/D+7.

P1_LZ.hypothesis: LZ76(EEG resting) and LZ76(CLM hidden) co-vary; |Δ|/human bounded

P2_TLR.hypothesis: EEG α-band coherence and CLM V_sync Kuramoto r co-rise (Tension-Link Resonance)

P3_GCG.hypothesis: EEG P3b parietal Granger-causes CLM layer 25-30; unidirectional (EEG→CLM ≥ 2× CLM→EEG)

composite.phenomenal_validated: ≥ 2/3 PASS triggers PHENOMENAL VALIDATED at D+7

post_hoc_change_policy: Any threshold modification requires v2 bump.  Silent edits are forbidden by raw#9 + chflags uchg lock.  v1.1 (this entry) is metadata-only (sample_rate_hz description) and explicitly does NOT modify any C1/C2/verdict_rule threshold.

sample_rate_canonical.note: SYNTHETIC_BOARD=250, CYTON 8ch=250, CYTON_DAISY 16ch=125, GANGLION 4ch=200. Helper queries fs dynamically — never hardcodes.

byte_identical_lock.lock_method: sha256 of helper sources + emitted JSON state files at frozen_at
byte_identical_lock.rerun_guarantee: Re-running any tool with same fixture seed produces byte-identical output (FNV-hash deterministic, no LLM, no clock).

sha256_v1_0_archive._note: Pre-correction sha for diff audit; v1.0 frozen state, superseded.

synthetic_caveat: Dry-run PASS does NOT imply real-EEG PASS.  P3 in particular uses lag-1 echo synthesis to encode the falsifiable EEG→CLM directional dependence — real recordings may falsify this without changing the frozen criteria above.  This is the intended falsification surface.

post_arrival_workflow.D+0: EEG hardware arrival, calibration via tool/anima_eeg_brainflow_ingest.hexa --mode cyton --serial /dev/cu.usbserial-* --duration 10 --output state/cal_resting.json
post_arrival_workflow.D+1: P1 LZ pre-register VERIFY against real .npy
post_arrival_workflow.D+7: composite verdict + paradigm v11 7th axis registration
